content_body:
Picture this: the lush fairways stretch out before you as you prepare to tee-off at a golf course in the Blue Ridge mountains. The sound of a perfectly struck golf ball echoes through the crisp mountain air as it slices the fairway. Among many other things, North Georgia is the perfect destination for a golf trip and guys getaway in Blue Ridge. In this blog, we will show you how to plan an escape filled with golf, adventure, and camaraderie.

Finding the Perfect Cabin in Blue Ridge, GA:

The foundation of your guys getaway is finding a comfortable and convenient place to stay. Offering a variety of amenities, our luxury cabins boast the best perks for a guys trip. Whether a game room, Smart TV, or proximity to the best North Georgia golf courses peak your interest, these Blue Ridge cabins will set your trip up for success.

On the day of arrival, share stories, play card games, and enjoy some quality "bro time" while taking in the brisk mountain air at Serendipity on Noontootla Creek. Five King suites will allow your group to spread out as needed while providing the perfect space to enjoy a cigar on the back porch or a football game in the living room. 

Choosing the Best Golf Courses:

Several exceptional golf courses that offer a challenging yet scenic experience abound in the Blue Ridge area. Make sure to book your tee times in advance, especially if you're traveling during peak golfing season. Some of the highest rated golf courses in North Georgia to consider include:

Old Toccoa Farm: A stunning course with mountain views and a serene river setting.

Whitepath Golf Club: A challenging and well-maintained course surrounded by natural beauty and national forest.

Brasstown Valley Golf Course: Beautiful and challenging water holes, blind shots, and countless bunkers.

Conveniently, all of these courses are 15-45 minutes from our luxury cabins. Plus, golfing in Blue Ridge, GA is a year-round activity that will not disappoint during your guys trip!

Plan for Other North Georgia Activities:

While golf will likely be the highlight of your trip, don't forget to explore the other adventures Blue Ridge has to offer. This quaint mountain town boasts opportunities from shopping to dining and fly fishing outfitters to white water rafting. Consider scheduling time for activities such as:

Fishing on the Toccoa River: Blue Ridge is known as the Trout Capital of Georgia, so catch some monster-sized rainbow trout in these refreshing waters! North Georgia Trout Fishing will provide the best fly fishing guided trips for your crew. 

Zip Lining: Get an adrenaline rush by planning a zip lining excursion and soar over the national forests! Use Blue Ridge Zip Line Canopy Tours for this exciting excursion and experience North Georgia from a whole new level.

Shops for the Guys: Perusing the boutiques of downtown Blue Ridge is not just for the ladies! Vertigo Pinball, Smokey Bear Cigars & Cafe, and Oyster Bamboo Fly Rods are just a few of the specialty shops on Main Street to explore.

North Georgia Hiking: Explore the Appalachian Trail with hikes like The Swinging Bridge, Long Creek Falls, and Brasstown Bald. No mountain getaway would be complete without a walk through the national forests, and these tried and true hikes offer some of the best views in the area.

Enjoy Local Eateries and Breweries:

After a day on the greens or an adventure-filled outing, satisfy your appetite at one of downtown Blue Ridge's restaurants. Consider dining at local favorites like Harvest on Main, Ferraro's Kitchen, or Masseria. If you would rather bring the fine dining to you, check out the private chefs in the area! Enjoy a memorable evening with a 5-course meal and your best buds. Cap off the evening with a cigar while watching the sunset.

While in downtown Blue Ridge, make sure to sample some craft beers at the local breweries! Grumpy Old Men Brewing and Tipping Point Brewing Company are just a few of our favorites.

Evening Entertainment:

Blue Ridge offers some nightlife options for those looking to extend the fun into the evening. Catch live music at the local breweries or Tooney's Music Venue in nearby McCaysville, GA! No matter the season, live music is always adding rhythm and joyful noise to the mountain air.

A guys getaway to Blue Ridge, Georgia is the perfect opportunity to combine your love for golf with the serenity of the North Georgia mountains. With challenging golf courses, exciting outdoor adventures, flavorful dishes, and cozy cabins, you and your buddies can create lasting memories and strengthen your camaraderie. So, gather your golf clubs, pack your bags, and get ready for an unforgettable escape in Blue Ridge.
title: Tee Times and Mountain Memories: Planning the Ultimate Golf Trip to Blue Ridge, GA
